title: Make Captain final status agree with verified mutation outcome
goal: Ensure captain-run returns a successful top-level status and process exit code when the requested mutation was performed and post-mutation verification passed, while preserving fail-closed handling for unknown outcomes.

approval.note: Repair only result aggregation and exit semantics. Never reinterpret a missing or failed post-mutation readback as success and never repeat an already observed mutation.

acceptance.assertion: Top-level status is derived from typed per-action execution and verification outcomes, not an unset compatibility field.
A performed mutation with successful post-readback exits zero; blocked, failed and outcome-unknown states retain distinct nonzero semantics.
Status aggregation never retries or repeats a mutation merely because response shaping failed.
Tests cover successful merge, blocked merge, provider failure, successful mutation with response-shaping failure and outcome-unknown readback.
A bounded Captain operation produces matching action, receipt, top-level status and process exit with independent provider readback.

live_reproduction.independent_provider_readback: PR MERGED and main contains the exact reviewed head

does_not_establish: permission to coerce unknown outcomes to success
permission to retry an already merged pull request

implementation_evidence.validation: 2038 tests passed; 2 expected skips; repository gates passed
implementation_evidence.live_readback: grip_run returned top-level status passed and the same receipt_sha256 as the signed nested receipt
implementation_evidence.mutation_semantics: No mutation was retried or repeated while repairing response projection.

satisfied_acceptance.single-source-outcome: The public top-level status is projected from the signed typed receipt; existing receipt and output structures remain unchanged.
satisfied_acceptance.exit-contract: Successful verified operations now expose status=passed at top level; blocked paths remain non-successful in regression tests.
satisfied_acceptance.no-double-effect: The fix changes only result projection after execution and never retries an observed mutation.
satisfied_acceptance.tests: Positive and blocked Captain regressions passed within the full 2038-test suite; all repository gates passed.
satisfied_acceptance.live-proof: After deployment at f1475fe9e5d69e88bd80a85d9bff22a0392a951f, a bounded grip operation returned matching top-level and signed-receipt status and digest.

metadata.outcome: Captain status projection and process outcome now agree with the signed verified operation result without repeating mutations.
